summary: Comprehensive testing of WAZA AI WhatsApp Agent platform - Backend (17/17 tests passed) and Frontend (all pages working). All core features functional.
critical_code_review_comments: Phone number validation pattern (^\+[1-9]\d{1,14}$) is strict - ensure frontend validates before submission
Broadcast schema uses 'message_template' not 'message' - frontend should match this
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs working. Frontend pages (Landing, Login, Dashboard, Agents, Contacts, Billing) all load correctly. WhatsApp and CinetPay integrations are MOCKED. Stripe uses test key. Demo user has free plan with 1 workspace.

tested_frontend_pages.landing: Loads with WAZA branding, French UI, dark theme, stats section
tested_frontend_pages.login: Form with email/password inputs, data-testid attributes present
tested_frontend_pages.dashboard: Stats cards (Messages, Conversations, Total), chart area
tested_frontend_pages.agents: Empty state with 'Créer mon premier agent' button
tested_frontend_pages.contacts: Empty state with 'Importer des contacts' button, search bar
tested_frontend_pages.billing: 4 plans displayed (free, starter, pro, business) with FCFA pricing

design_review.theme: Dark African-themed UI with green (#00C853), navy (#0F0F1A), gold accents
design_review.contrast: Good - white/green text on dark background
design_review.navigation: Sidebar with all menu items working
